decision_rationale: The total-obligations column. Era-invariant across the vol-71 boundary (identical label FY2020-FY2023). This is the column the HD 3.2 spine + dollar-match receipt run on; it does NOT depend on the deferred 8->6/relabel boundary crosswalk. Canonical key 'all_obligations' is assigned in etl/_load_fedsupport.py (ALL_OBLIGATIONS_CANONICAL); every other column is preserved as a raw label pending the deferred crosswalk.
Research and development obligations. Label stable across the vol-71 boundary (FY2020 and FY2021+ both read 'R&D'). Canonical key 'rd'.
R&D plant (facilities/fixed equipment for R&D) obligations. Label stable across the boundary. Canonical key 'rd_plant'.

raw_activity_label: Facilities and equipment for instruction in S&E
decision_rationale: Post-redesign label (FY2021+). The pre-redesign FY2020 label is 'Facilities for instruction in S&E' (no 'and equipment'). Whether the post-redesign column is the SAME measure relabeled or absorbs equipment dollars previously elsewhere is the DEFERRED boundary question (HD 3.2 sec 5.2) — this stub records the canonical name for the FY2021+ column ONLY; the FY2020->FY2021+ mapping row is NOT authored here.

raw_activity_label: S&E fellowships, traineeships, and training grants
decision_rationale: Post-redesign label (FY2021+). Pre-redesign FY2020 label is 'Fellowships, traineeships, and training grants' (no leading 'S&E'). Likely the same measure with an 'S&E' qualifier added; the boundary mapping is DEFERRED. Canonical name for the FY2021+ column only.

Post-redesign label (FY2021+). Pre-redesign FY2020 label is 'General support for S&E' (no leading 'Other'). The 'Other' qualifier suggests a residual-category reframing at vol-71; the FY2020->FY2021+ reconciliation (does FY2020 'General support' == FY2021+ 'Other general support', or did a category move?) is the DEFERRED RH-native boundary crosswalk (HD 3.2 sec 5.2, gate HD 3.1 sec 4). Canonical name for the FY2021+ column only.
